action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline mae_60min=4.0419 with 5 epochs, ~22s/epoch. Model still improving. Analysis: Need more training and potentially larger model. With ~2.95h left, I can afford 50 epochs (~18 min). Decision: Train 50 epochs with current architecture, then evaluate. Also increase hidden_dim to 128 for more capacity.
